# Tasks 001 — Ratified Phase 2 (fixture)

> Fixture for Theia parser tests. Mirrors the shape of real
> tasks.md files so UX-006 (human-readable rendering) and
> UX-007 (done styling, summary markdown, section refs) can
> both be verified against a realistic fixture.

## PR 1 — Foundation

- [x] T-01: scaffold `tools/theia/` directory layout + `package.json` (spec §1-§4, AC-4)
- [x] T-02: **strict** parser for `**Status:**` lines (plan §3, AC-5)

## PR 2 — Wiring

- [ ] T-03: render `tasks.md` as an enumerated list (plan §5, AC-1, AC-2)
- [x] T-04: **ship** the spec detail view (plan §6, AC-3)
